DashboardData.description: `fetchDashboard` result: counts for every queue + nodes for the active one.

GithubAccountSummary.description: Account header on the dashboard response (port of `GithubAccountSummaryT`).

GithubCreatePullInput.description: Body for creating a PR (port of `GithubCreatePullInputT`).

GithubDashboard.description:
The full dashboard response (port of `GithubDashboardT`). Persisted as the
`dashboard_snapshot` jsonb for cold-start SWR.

GithubPullEnrichmentResult.description:
A batch enrichment entry: the ref echoed back with its enrichment (port of
`GithubPullEnrichmentResultT`).

GithubPullRef.description: One PR to enrich in a batch request (port of `GithubPullRefT`).

GithubPullRequestEnrichment.description:
Detail-derived fields, fetched lazily per PR (port of
`GithubPullRequestEnrichmentT`).

QueueErrorKind.description:
Whether a failing dashboard queue should degrade quietly (Agile/sprint
features absent on a non-Software site) or surface as a real error.

info.description: Rust port of the Workflow backend (GitHub + Jira integrations).
info.title: Workflow API

get.summary: GET /me/github/branches — branch→PR prompts across selected repos.
GET /me/github/favorites — the user's favorite workflows per repo.

put.summary: PUT /me/github/favorites — set one repo's favorites; returns the full map.

post.summary: POST /me/github/pulls/enrich — batch-enrich the supplied PR refs.

put.summary: PUT /me/github/repos — set selection; nulls snapshot, clears caches.

post.summary: POST /me/github/token — validate against GitHub, then store.

get.summary: GET /me/github/workflows — active workflows across selected repos.

post.summary: POST /me/jira/issue — create an issue (fields pass the metadata allowlist).

get.summary: GET /me/jira/issuetypes?projectKey — issue types for a project.

post.summary: POST /me/jira/token — validate credentials against Jira, then store.
